N my dearest Nada,

7abibty, every photograph in this gallery is a piece of my heart that belongs to you. You came into my life and turned ordinary moments into memories I will treasure forever. This card, this page, this small digital world — all of it was built for one reason: to tell you that I am grateful for every second we have shared. You are my favourite story. And I cannot wait to keep writing it with you..

You are my favourite person in every room, in every moment, in every version of my life...happy birthday ya nody 😘

rbna y5leke lya ya 7abibty ♥️🌍♥️

— Mohamed ♡
